name: Monstera Deliciosa Devil Variegated Planting Rooted Nodes Cuttings
excerpt: Monstera Deliciosa Devil Variegated Planting Rooted 5 Nodes Cuttings
description:
The Monstera "Devil Monster" is a rare variegated form featuring dramatically fenestrated leaves with stunning white and green variegation. The leaves exhibit a unique marbled pattern where the white variegation appears to have a crystalline or frosted quality, especially prominent along the leaf veins and edges. Each leaf displays the classic Monstera deliciosa shape with deep splits and holes (fenestrations), but with this special variegated coloring that creates an almost silver-white appearance with touches of green. The plant is shown growing in a white pot with support stakes to assist its climbing growth habit.

Due to import regulations, all plants are shipped bare root with a phytosanitary certificate from Australia. Plants can experience stress from long international transit, Most imported plants need to be rehabilitated and acclimatized.

We pack your plants with care and hope that the plants get delivered to you in good condition. It may happen that plants do not survive the shipping process. We are truly sorry, and you can request your refund or replacement within 3 days of delivery. Our nursery is based in Sydney, Australia, and we do not accept return

name: Alocasia Azlanii Live Corms for Propagation Rare Jewel Aroid
excerpt: Alocasia Azlanii Live Corms for Propagation Rare Jewel Aroid
description:
This listing offers live Alocasia Azlanii corms intended for propagation.

Corms are provided as planting material for growers who wish to cultivate a rare jewel aroid from its earliest growth stage rather than purchasing an established plant.

Item Overview

You will receive unrooted Alocasia Azlanii corms selected for viability. Corms may be dormant or beginning to activate depending on natural growth cycles. Quantity and size vary based on the selected variation, and natural differences between individual corms should be expected.

Plant Characteristics

Alocasia Azlanii is prized for its glossy, jewel-toned foliage with deep coloration and prominent vein structure once mature. Leaf color intensity, patterning, and surface sheen develop over time and are influenced by growing conditions, light exposure, and humidity.

Starting the Corm

Corms can be placed in lightly moist coco peat, sphagnum moss, or a well-draining propagation medium. Warm temperatures, consistent moisture, and indirect light encourage successful sprouting. Activation timing varies and cannot be guaranteed.

Ongoing Care

After sprouting, provide bright indirect light and maintain evenly moist conditions without excess watering. Higher humidity supports healthy leaf formation. This species performs best in warm, stable indoor environments.

Packing Method

Each corm is carefully prepared and packed using coco peat to help maintain moisture levels and minimize stress during transit.

Important Details

This listing includes corms only and does not include pots, soil, stems, leaves, or mature plants. Growth behavior, leaf coloration, and final appearance vary by individual plant and care conditions. Minor surface marks and natural imperfections are normal for live propagation material.

Suitable for collectors, jewel aroid enthusiasts, and growers seeking rare indoor propagation material.This listing offers live Alocasia Azlanii corms intended for propagation.

name: Monstera Deliciosa Mint Variegated Tissue Culture Rooted Cutting – Rare Aroid – Tropical Houseplant Starter
excerpt: Monstera Deliciosa Mint Variegated Tissue Culture Rooted Cutting – Rare Aroid – Tropical Houseplant Starter
description:
Handpicked by Greenhousecon

🌿 Monstera Deliciosa Mint – Tissue Culture Rooted Cutting

Grow a rare and highly collectible plant with this Monstera Deliciosa Mint Variegated Tissue Culture Rooted Cutting. 🌱 This beautiful aroid features soft mint-green variegation and unique leaf patterns, making it a standout addition to any indoor plant collection. 💚✨

This cutting is tissue culture propagated and carefully acclimated, ensuring strong roots and healthy growth. 🌿 Each piece is fully rooted and ready to continue developing into a stunning tropical plant under proper care. 🪴

Perfect for collectors and plant lovers looking to grow a rare Monstera with stable variegation. 🌴

🌸 Cutting Features

• 🌱 Tissue culture rooted cutting

• 💚 Mint variegated foliage

• 🌿 Rare Monstera deliciosa

• 🪴 Acclimated and healthy

• ✨ Collector’s plant

🌱 Cutting Size Options (Variation)

• Small Cutting – Approx. 8–12 cm 🌱

• Medium Cutting – Approx. 12–20 cm 🌿

• Large Cutting – Approx. 20–30 cm 🌴

(Size may vary slightly due to natural growth)

📏 Average Cutting Size

• Height: 8–20 cm

• Leaves: 1–2 leaves with node

🏡 Perfect For

🏡 Indoor plant collections

🌿 Rare plant collectors

🎁 Unique plant gifts

🧑‍💻 Home & office decor

📦 Shipping & Handling

• Carefully packed to protect roots 📦

• Moisture retention method used 🌱

• Cutting may adjust after arrival – normal process

⏱ Processing Time

1 – 2 Business Days

🌿 Materials

excerpt: Pink Monstera Variegated Rooted Cutting – Rare Tropical Aroid – Indoor Houseplant Starter
description:
🌸 Pink Monstera – Variegated Rooted Cutting

Bring home a rare and eye-catching tropical plant with this Pink Monstera Variegated Rooted Cutting. 🌱 Known for its unique pink-toned variegation and striking foliage, this plant is a must-have for collectors and plant lovers. 💗✨

Each cutting is fully rooted, healthy, and carefully selected, ensuring a strong start for successful growth. 🌿 Ready to pot and thrive, it will develop into a stunning climbing or trailing Monstera under proper care. 🪴

Perfect for plant enthusiasts looking to grow a rare and beautiful tropical statement plant. 🌴

🌸 Cutting Features

• 🌱 Fully rooted cutting

• 💗 Pink variegation tones

• 🌿 Rare Monstera variety

• 🌴 Climbing / trailing growth

• ✨ Highly collectible

• Medium Cutting – Approx. 15–25 cm 🌿

• Large Cutting – Approx. 25–35 cm 🌴

• Leaves: 1–2 leaves with node
